description: Enjoy the best north shore living at Third Street – a collection of 8 contemporary townhouses in vibrant Moodyville. This stunning energy efficient home provides you w/ open concept living, designer finishes, private garage w/ EV charging & storage space.  Modern architectural elements are designed throughout, incl. Scandinavian inspired finishes & a central glass enclosed staircase. Spacious interior w/ 4 bedrooms & 4 bathrooms (1 bedroom & ensuite on lower level that can serve as an income earner). Fabulous chef’s kitchen features premium appliances - a joy to cook in & entertain from. Also features A/C, triple glazed windows, & an expansive rooftop deck that offers views of the ocean & mountains!  Open House Feb.28 2-4pm Brochure: https://bit.ly/3-752east3rd
